name: Pari Mahal (Palace of Fairies)
description: A stunning seven-terraced Mughal garden featuring ancient ruins that look like a fairy-tale castle. It sits high on a hill overlooking the Dal Lake and the city of Srinagar.
history: Built in the mid-17th century by Dara Shikoh, the eldest son of Emperor Shah Jahan, to serve as a library and an astronomical observatory.
famousFor: Seven terraced gardens, ancient ruins, sunset views over Dal Lake.
